content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is weak: Nifty -1.04%, IT -3.82%, VIX +3.66% to 19.27. Defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma) are also red after yesterday's bounce. Book is already 67% deployed with -0.33% session P&L; no case for adding fresh longs into weakness. Priority is managing existing positions — trail SLs on winners, tighten on losers near key levels.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 75.84 vs entry 81.50 (-6.9%). Stock pulled back from 52-wk high after Q4 beat (PAT +35%, NII +18.8%, GNPA improving). Brokerages raised targets to Rs 88-90. Current SL at 75.00 is just below CMP — letting it breathe near support 76.95 / pivot 80.25. Cannot tighten further without effectively triggering exit. Holding for either bounce to 80+ or SL trigger at 75."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.0,
      "new_target": 1100.0,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.9% in our favor; trail SL up from 984 (entry) to 995 to lock in small gain while preserving room to upside (target Rs 1,081-1,203 consensus). Q4 was 14% beat, GNPA <1%, MOFSL Buy. Today's intraday low 995 = natural support. SL distance 2.5% from CMP, well within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 123.75 vs entry 125.10 (-1%). Gold correcting on US-Iran ceasefire progress but VIX at 19+ keeps safe-haven thesis alive. SL at 119 (-5% from entry) gives room. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.0,
      "new_target": 1520.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position barely positive but Q4 was blockbuster (+27% PAT, +22.6% revenue, +50% A&P spend). Stock made fresh 52-wk high yesterday at 1430. Tightening SL slightly from 1400 to 1405 (still below today's low 1409.50, just above entry). FMCG defensive bid intact in weak market."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.0,
      "new_target": 1150.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "AUBANK made fresh 52-wk high 1079 today, now at 1054. SL is currently at entry (1049) — moving to 1035 (just below S1 1032 and gives more breathing room ahead of Q4 results Apr 25/27). Audited results are binary event; want some buffer but still locked near breakeven. Provisional Q4 already strong (advances +25%, deposits +23%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 684 vs entry 681. Stock at 52-wk high 696 yesterday. Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event. SL at 675 (-0.9% from entry) is already tight. Original target 740 still valid. Holding as-is into earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.9%, broke below today's open. Q4 results Apr 30. SL at 2260 (-4.7% from entry, -2.9% from CMP) gives room into earnings. Axis target Rs 2540, consensus Hold. Not tightening further to avoid noise-stopout pre-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 393.0,
      "new_target": 425.0,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, holding above SMA20. Tightening SL from 388 to 393 (just below today's intraday low 399 wouldn't give room; 393 ~ recent swing area, -1.8% from CMP). Reducing target from 430 to 425 to be more achievable in 2-week window given consensus Rs 400-440."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OFSS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Stock up ~28% in 3 sessions post Q4 blowout (PAT +31%, EBIT margin 50.4%, dividend Rs 270). Chase risk too high; would need pullback to Rs 8,400-8,500 area to consider. Not adding to a stock 11% from 52-wk high after vertical rally on a -1% market day.",
      "confidence": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONESOURCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "5-day rally +13.7% on tentative FDA Ozempic approval. 'Tentative' means commercial revenue still gated by Novo patent expiry — no near-term cash flow catalyst. Chasing momentum into weak market with 2.2x intraday range is poor R:R.",
      "confidence": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HUDCO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Bearish supplementary research: Q3 PAT -3% YoY despite 30% AUM growth (margin compression), exchange fines, governance issues. +3.4% today is a bounce in downtrend; stock already gave back from intraday high 214 to 211. Not chasing.",
      "confidence": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Bearish supplementary: Q3 PAT -15.85% YoY, input costs (AN +44%, diesel +54%) hit Apr 1, NTPC commercial coal procurement structurally negative. Citi target Rs 430 below CMP. Q4 results Apr 27 is downside binary event. Skip.",
      "confidence": 0.3
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Up 30% YoY, would consider on pullback but current setup adds cluster risk: NTPC + GOLDBEES already in defensive/commodity bucket. Crude direction binary on US-Iran. Pass.",
      "confidence": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Underperforming OIL, stuck near MACD bearish crossover, ceasefire progress is downside risk. No edge vs current oil/energy exposure via NTPC.",
      "confidence": 0.35
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Trading 189% above Morningstar fair value, Q4 results Apr 29 (binary event), expensive setup. Not a place to deploy on weak market day.",
      "confidence": 0.35
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Did not receive deep data this cycle. Skipping.",
      "confidence": 0.4
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.0,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 is already at intraday low; tightening further means immediate stopout. Letting position breathe; thesis (Q4 beat, sector momentum) intact. If stopped at 75 = ~7.9% loss, ~0.65% portfolio impact — within risk budget given the position is already underwater."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.0,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from entry (984) to 995 to lock in small gain. Today's intraday low 995 = natural support. Position +3.9%, follows the +2% trailing mandate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.0,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL at 119 (-5%) gives room for gold consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.0,
      "reasoning": "Slight tighten from 1400 to 1405 (just above entry). Stock made fresh 52-wk high; locking in breakeven plus."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.0,
      "reasoning": "Buffer ahead of Q4 results Apr 25/27. Currently SL = entry; loosening to 1035 to avoid noise stopout pre-results given strong provisional update. Note: this loosens the SL — but will be flagged; if rejected, defaulting to HOLD at 1049."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 675.0,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL appropriate ahead of Apr 29 binary earnings. Stock at 52-wk high zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.0,
      "reasoning": "SL gives room into Apr 30 earnings; not tightening on -1.9% intraday weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 393.0,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 388 to 393 — closer to recent swing low, reduces drawdown risk from -4% to -2.8%."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS, ONESOURCE, AUBANK results are imminent catalysts to watch. PNBHOUSING and MAHABANK are PSU/financial cluster — already at exposure limit. CLEAN, ATUL volume surges flagged but no clean entry today. Re-evaluate OIL / ONGC on Brent pullback to identify upstream entry without crude-spike chasing.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed with 8 positions across PSU bank, HFC, gold, FMCG (2), banking, pharma, energy — reasonably diversified. Cluster check: financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~37% of deployed, near sector cap. FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) = ~9%. No room for more financial/banking adds. Today's session: trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND), tighten on slow names (NTPC), hold pre-earnings binaries. NO new entries on a -1% market day with VIX rising — capital preservation discipline. Note on AUBANK MODIFY: I'm loosening SL slightly which guardrails may reject; that is acceptable — fallback is HOLD at 1049."
}
